assertions.assertion: Calls AddJwtBearer with Authority set to 'https://identity.example.com'
Sets TokenValidationParameters.ValidTypes to include 'at+jwt' to prevent JWT confusion attacks
assertions.rationale: Response sets ValidTypes = ["at+jwt"] and explains JWT confusion attack prevention

assertions.assertion: Includes UseAuthentication() before UseAuthorization() in the middleware pipeline
assertions.rationale: Response shows UseAuthentication() before UseAuthorization() and explicitly notes the ordering requirement
Response includes dotnet add package command and updated csproj with the package
